text.tspan: domenica 12 luglio 2026 alle ore 20:08 Ora legale dell’Europa centrale

Executable application assembly and runtime composition boundary. It starts the S3 WebFlux application, starts the admin/static Netty server, selects the object-store backend, and serves static UI/docs/report assets copied into bootstrap-application during generate-resources. Static assets are no longer owned by admin-api-adapter.
using AWS CLI, SDK, curl, or
browser adapters. It calls the Admin
Control Plane and, only when a
signer are configured, the S3 Data
and report assets. This is the target
of the staged static asset handoff;
